movie.actors: Kevin Peter Hall, Danny Glover, Gary Busey, Rubén Blades
movie.plot: Amidst a territorial gang war in 1997, a sophisticated alien hunter stalks the citizens of Los Angeles and the only man between him and his prey is veteran L.A.P.D. officer, Lieutenant Mike Harrigan.
movie.title: Predator 2
movie.writer: Jim Thomas (characters), John Thomas (characters), Jim Thomas, John Thomas
